description: Capability for the app's windows (a label missing here gets ZERO IPC, silently). Minimal by intent: geometry is Rust-owned (dock.rs SetWindowPos + the set_window_size command) so the webview needs NO window set-size/set-position/monitor perms, and every opener call is Rust-side (prefs.rs open_logs/open_data_folder/open_repo via app.opener(), which bypasses the webview capability) so opener:default is not granted. allow-start-dragging is the ONE window perm kept — the prefs window's data-tauri-drag-region depends on it.
